# Agents README

Agent runtime descriptors are stored in this folder as `.agent.md` files.

## Rules
- Keep YAML frontmatter limited to `name`, `description`, and `agents`.
- Store role instructions in `engineering/ai-assets/`.
- Store verified facts in `engineering/ai-memory/`.
- Do not add unmanaged or duplicate agent descriptors.

## Active agents
- `viseo-product-assistant`
- `viseo-ai-steward`
- `viseo-architect-assistant`
- `viseo-dev-assistant`
- `viseo-qa-assistant`
- `viseo-security-assistant`
- `viseo-ux-assistant`
- `viseo-devops-assistant`
